preview._comment: Internal distribution APK for campaign partner testers. Installable via direct download (side-load) without Play Store review. Kept on free-tier EAS Build (30 builds/month).

production._comment: Play Store-ready AAB. Signing credentials are managed by EAS (eas credentials), so the hardcoded /Users/zacharyanselm/... signing path in android/app/build.gradle is no longer required.

android._comment: Play Store submission is manual during campaign launch; uncomment when automated release is desired.
